chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S- 986 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 10047/2025. 2. For hearing of MA 8895/2025. 20.11.2025. Mr. Mashooque Ali, Advocate for applicant / surety. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. Counsel for the surety submits that vide Order dated 06.09.2024 the applicants/accused were granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. Thereafter, on 25.11.2024 the ad-interim bail granted to the applicants/accused was confirmed on the same terms and conditions and now the applicants / accused have been acquitted by the trial Court by way of compromise vide Order dated 09.07.2025, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned A.P.G after going through the record, tendered her no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE Tufail
